# Canada Anti-Spam Legislation

Jurisdiction: Canada
Region: CA
Citation: An Act to promote the efficiency and adaptability of the Canadian economy by regulating certain activities that discourage reliance on electronic means
Authority: Justice Laws Website / CRTC
Source URL: https://laws-lois.justice.gc.ca/eng/acts/E-1.6/
Topics: consent, marketing_opt_out, notice_transparency
Keywords: CASL, commercial electronic messages, unsubscribe, express consent, implied consent

## Summary
Canadian anti-spam law regulating commercial electronic messages, installation of computer programs, consent, identification, and unsubscribe mechanisms.

## Key compliance obligations
- Obtain express or implied consent for commercial electronic messages.
- Include required identification and unsubscribe information.
- Track consent evidence and unsubscribe requests.
